title: Single Cell Transcriptional Perturbome in Pluripotent Stem Cell Models: Protocols 1-4
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"tx4cx","text":"iPS2-10X-seq relies on microfluidics partitioning-based scRNA-seq from 10X Genomics. Despite the higher costs, the ease and reproducibility of this commercial method have led to its widespread adoption. The procedure integrates the manufacturer’s protocol to generate an additional NGS library containing UCI-BCs. This is sequenced in parallel to the standard gene expression library to enable in silico matching of UCI-BCs and single-cell transcriptomes through their shared unique cell barcodes. Of note, iPS2-10X-seq provides built-in support for the cost-saving strategy of reasonably overloading the microfluidics chip, since cell doublets are readily identified by the co-expression of two different UCI-BCs and filtered out as part of the standard catcheR_10Xcatch pipeline. Thus, it is possible to load the cell number recommended by the manufacturer for barcoded sample pools even in the absence of additional multiplexing barcodes. Other cost-saving strategies include the use of cell multiplexing oligos (CMOs) or barcoded antibodies against housekeeping cell surface antigens to multiplex tet-untreated and tet-treated cells in a single microfluidics channel, enabling robust control versus knockdown experimental design without having to perform two separate reactions.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"eih0v","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ff27e","text":"This Protocol describes the following procedures:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":49}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5dejq","text":"Prepare the gene expression library","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fqetl","text":"Prepare the shRNA barcode library","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"55nmv","text":"Library pooling and NGS","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c7rep","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1gs6b","text":"This protocol was optimized using the Chromium Next GEM Single Cell 3’ Reagent Kits v3.1 (Dual Index) from 10X Genomics and has been successfully validated with the next-generation GEM-X Single Cell 3’ Reagent Kits v4, without requiring changes to primer sequences. It must be used in conjunction with the appropriate 10X Genomics protocols: CG00315 Rev E (single sample), CG000388 Rev B (multiplexed samples), or CG000419 Rev D (high-throughput) for v3.1;, and CG000731 Rev A for v4. Notably, v4 no longer supports cell multiplexing oligo (CMO)-based on sample multiplexing but remains fully compatible with antibody-derived tag (ADT)–based","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":38,"length":50},{"style":"italic","offset":165,"length":52},{"style":"bold","offset":342,"length":13},{"style":"bold","offset":373,"length":14},{"style":"bold","offset":414,"length":14},{"style":"bold","offset":462,"length":14}],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":342,"length":13},{"key":1,"offset":373,"length":14},{"key":2,"offset":414,"length":14},{"key":3,"offset":462,"length":14}],"data":{}},{"key":"37u7n","text":"strategies.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9evbt","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b60u1","text":"A first variation, iPS2-CITE-seq, enables surface protein profiling and ADT-based multiplexing using barcoded TotalSeq-B antibodies from BioLegend. When using antibodies, refer to protocol CG000149 Rev D (antibody labeling) in combination with CG000317 Rev E for v3.1 or CG000731 Rev A for v4.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":189,"length":14},{"style":"bold","offset":244,"length":15},{"style":"bold","offset":271,"length":14}],"entityRanges":[{"key":4,"offset":189,"length":14},{"key":5,"offset":244,"length":14},{"key":6,"offset":271,"length":14}],"data":{}},{"key":"ecapi","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9307i","text":"A second variation, iPS2-multi-seq, adapts the protocol for use with the 10X Genomics Single Cell Multiome ATAC \u0026 Gene Expression kit. It should be paired with CG000365 Rev C (nuclei isolation) and CG000338 Rev F (library construction).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":160,"length":14},{"style":"bold","offset":198,"length":14}],"entityRanges":[{"key":7,"offset":160,"length":14},{"key":8,"offset":198,"length":14}],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"9837B93CADE24D1E957753B920F89561","url":"https://cdn.10xgenomics.com/image/upload/v1668017706/support-documents/CG000315_ChromiumNextGEMSingleCell3-_GeneExpression_v3.1_DualIndex__RevE.pdf"}},"1":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"2FC67FEA2E434D56901E159D050FA1AC","url":"https://cdn.10xgenomics.com/image/upload/v1660261285/support-documents/CG000391_DemonstratedProtocol_CellLabelingwithCellMultiplexingOligo_RevB.pdf"}},"2":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"50CA0330F7F04A40B92035356E627F44","url":"https://cdn.10xgenomics.com/image/upload/v1666737555/support-documents/CG000419_Chromium_NextGEM_SingleCell3-_HT_v3.1_GeneExp_CMO_RevD.pdf"}},"3":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"1608A335CEDB4B7C906988415651E744","url":"https://cdn.10xgenomics.com/image/upload/v1710230393/support-documents/CG000731_ChromiumGEM-X_SingleCell3_ReagentKits_v4_UserGuide_RevA.pdf"}},"4":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"D932520226D041C8ABA1F67A2D691BC8","url":"https://cdn.10xgenomics.com/image/upload/v1660261285/support-documents/CG000149_Demonstrated_Protocol_CellSurface_Protein_Labeling_Rev_D.pdf"}},"5":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"80D3CB3CB977467E8A8B25BF21E6A1E3","url":"https://cdn.10xgenomics.com/image/upload/v1722285782/support-documents/CG000317_ChromiumNextGEMSingleCell3_v3.1_CellSurfaceProtein_RevE.pdf"}},"6":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"671158A071CF42E7A90D7914E1948EB8","url":"https://cdn.10xgenomics.com/image/upload/v1710230393/support-documents/CG000731_ChromiumGEM-X_SingleCell3_ReagentKits_v4_UserGuide_RevA.pdf"}},"7":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"DDA65660A13F43EF899D4DA17EDC81DF","url":"https://cdn.10xgenomics.com/image/upload/v1747848350/support-documents/CG000365_DemonstratedProtocol_NucleiIsolation_ATAC_GEX_Sequencing_Rev_D.pdf"}},"8":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"19D65F5445104A218A873977E2E13C67","url":"https://cdn.10xgenomics.com/image/upload/v1666737555/support-documents/CG000338_ChromiumNextGEM_Multiome_ATAC_GEX_User_Guide_RevF.pdf"}}}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"ryvfu","text":"- NEBNext High-Fidelity 2X PCR Master Mix","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"zvjaz","text":"- iPS2-10X-seq_true5 (10 µM)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"qsisq","text":"- iPS2-10X-seq_inner (10 µM)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"utxrb","text":"- Preamplified 10X Genomics cDNA (50 ng)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ea7nv","text":"- Nuclease-free water","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"xwf5i","text":"- Dual Index Kit TT Set A primers","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"zshik","text":"- Qubit dsDNA High Sensitivity kit","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
